name: BACARDÍ Carta Blanca
title: BACARDÍ Superior Rum | White Rum | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: Savor the original premium white rum. With soft hints of almond and vanilla, BACARDÍ Superior blends seamlessly into the perfect cocktail.
marketing_description: In 1862, after 10 years of perfecting his rums, Don Facundo Bacardí Massó introduced the world to his BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum. A sublime rum for cocktails, it doesn’t dominate other flavours nor does it disappear when mixed. Perfect for classic rum cocktails like the Mojito. BACARDÍ Carta Blanca is a light and aromatic white rum with delicate floral and fruity notes, ideal for mixing. A rum destined for mixing. Unleash a world of new flavours and experiment with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca white rum in all your favourite cocktails.
tasting_notes: A classic profile. BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum serves up orange blossom, lavender and rose, teamed with apricot, lime, light coconut and ripe banana.
process: Filtered to perfection. This distinctive spirit is aged in American white oak barrels and shaped through a secret blend of charcoal for a distinctive smoothness, making it perfect for classic rum cocktails.
how_to_serve: Perfect for classic rum cocktails like the Mojito. The Perfect Mixer. Ideal for mixing.

faq_items.question: What is white rum?
faq_items.answer: White rum is usually a light-bodied variant with a soft, sweet taste. It’s often used in light refreshing cocktails, especially favourites, like the Mojito and Daiquiri.

faq_items.question: Is rum sweet?
faq_items.answer: Many think that, since rum is made from sugar cane, it must be sweet. But rum comes in a range of sweetness, from barely-there to an all-out sugar rush.

faq_items.question: How do you make rum?
faq_items.answer: Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended.
